title: The Gates of Azyr
author: chris-wraight
description: The first Stormcast Eternals descend upon the Mortal Realms as Sigmar's war of reconquest begins. Lord-Celestant Vandus Hammerhand leads the Hammers of Sigmar through the Gates of Azyr in the opening salvo of the Age of Sigmar — a war to reclaim a world lost to Chaos.

title: War Storm
author: nick-kyme
description: The Realmgate Wars continue as the Stormcast Eternals wage war across multiple fronts in the Mortal Realms. The forces of Order fight to secure the realmgates — the magical portals that link the eight Mortal Realms — before Chaos can use them to pour reinforcements into battle.

title: Ghal Maraz
author: guy-haley
description: Sigmar's legendary hammer Ghal Maraz was lost when the world drowned in Chaos. Now its location has been discovered in the Realm of Metal — but retrieving it will require fighting through armies of daemons and the most powerful servants of Chaos in existence.

title: Wardens of the Everqueen
author: c-l-werner
description: The Everqueen Alarielle, goddess of life, remains hidden and broken in the deepest forests of Ghyran while her realm is consumed by Nurgle's rot. The Stormcast Eternals sent to find her must first win her trust — and survive the wrath of nature itself — before they can bring her back to the war.

title: Lord of Undeath
author: c-l-werner
description: Nagash, Supreme Lord of the Undead, is a god whose agenda is his own — and not necessarily aligned with the forces of Order. As the Realmgate Wars reach a critical juncture, the God of Death makes his move, and the Stormcast Eternals must navigate a deadly alliance with a power that may be as dangerous as Chaos itself.
